entry.title: How can I auto close the MM & FI Period in SAP Hana 1709?
entry.content:
We have a requirement that at the end of every month we need to close the MM & FI period with some scheduler but the same period should be open for the specific users (i.e. Finance & Accounts team members) which again to be closed on 8th of every month.

Is there any default configuration available in SAP?

entry.title: Automatically Reassign Users to Another Class/Item in SAP SF LMS after Failed Attempt
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I have a scenario in SAP SuccessFactors LMS where a user has been relegated due to failing an attempt in a particular class. Is there a way to automatically reassign or enroll this user into another class or item?

Specifically, I am looking for insights on the following:

Automatic Assignment: Is there a standard SAP SF LMS feature that allows a user to be automatically placed into a different class or training item after they fail a given attempt?

Workflows/Triggers: Can workflows or any automated triggers be configured to enroll the user into another class based on their failure status?

Custom Configuration: If this functionality is not available out of the box, what customization options exist to achieve this behavior (e.g., using SAP SuccessFactors APIs, Business Rules, etc.)?

entry.title: Re: New My Home in SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2208 – Deep Dive
entry.content:
Hi,

The customer cannot seem to see the "My Home Settings". Is there a setup needed to make it appear on their user setting?

entry.title: Re: Inbound Process Putaway by Warehouse Order using RFUI
entry.content:
Hi Prasanna,

Thanks for sharing the Inbound Process Putaway by Warehouse Order using RFUI, its very informative.

Thanks,

Jayanth

entry.title: Re: Internal Server Error During MDK Project Deployment o...
entry.content:
@Jitendra_Kansal
Thanks a lot for sharing this solution,  I was able to access the MDK web app just as you explained. Really appreciate your help and the clear guidance!

entry.title: Re: Error: adding element with duplicate id 'listrepnorthwind::sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectP
entry.content: Hi @nicoschoenteich i will follow the guided development steps in VS code.

entry.title: Re: Consuming SAP with SAP Build Apps - creating a CRUD application
entry.content: The interoperability issue has been resolved by CAP, so the workaround is no longer required. Hence, I've removed the workaround.

entry.title: Re: Error: adding element with duplicate id 'listrepnorthwind::sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectP
entry.content:
Hi @junwu here is the code generated by the guided development and service as the northwind v2 service

<Annotations Target="NorthwindModel.Product">
<Annotation Term="UI.DataPoint" Qualifier="progressvieQ">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Path="UnitsInStock" Property="Value"/>
<PropertyValue Int="100" Property="TargetValue"/>
<PropertyValue EnumMember="UI.VisualizationType/Progress" Property="Visualization"/>
</Record>
</Annotation>
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="NorthwindModel.Product">
<Annotation Term="UI.LineItem">
<Collection>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="ProductID"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>productid}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="ProductName"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>productname}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="UnitPrice"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>unitprise}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/Medium"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="UnitsInStock"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>unitinstock}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/Medium"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="UnitsOnOrder"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>unitsonorder}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/Low"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="SupplierID"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>supplierid}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="CategoryID"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>categoryid}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataFieldForAnnotation">
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="UnitPrice Chart"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="@UI.Chart#columnchart"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataFieldForAnnotation">
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>progressive}"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="@UI.DataPoint#progressiveQ"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataFieldForAnnotation">
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Progressvice"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="@UI.DataPoint#progressiveQ"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
</Collection>
</Annotation>
</Annotations>

entry.title: btp - launch another program xml
entry.content:
If I click the 'Node1' menu on the project1 screen, I hope the project2 program's screen will be displayed.

The file structure is as shown in the picture.

 

My screen now looks like this.

I don't know if the routing setting in manifest.json is wrong, or if something else is wrong.
Currently, when I click the menu in project1, the xml screen of project2 does not appear.

How can I solve this problem?
Please look at my xml, controller, and manifest below and let me know if there are any mistakes.

<Project1>
1. Main.view.xml

<mvc:View

    xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"

    xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"

    xmlns="sap.m"

    controllerName="project1.ext.main.Main"

>

    <Page id="Main" title="Tree Menu">

        <content>

            <SplitApp id="SplitAppDemo">

                <masterPages>

                    <Page id="master" title="Tree Structure Menu">

                        <Tree id="Tree" items="{tree>/nodes}">

                            <StandardTreeItem

                                id="StandardTreeItem"

                                title="{tree>text}"

                                icon="{tree>ref}"

                                type="Active"

                                press=".onTreeItemPress"

                            />

                        </Tree>

                    </Page>

                </masterPages>

            </SplitApp>

        </content>

    </Page>

</mvc:View>

2. Main.controller.js

sap.ui.define(
    [
        'sap/fe/core/PageController',
        'sap/ui/model/json/JSONModel',
        'sap/ui/core/mvc/XMLView'
    ],
    function(PageController, JSONModel, XMLView) {
        'use strict';
        return PageController.extend('project1.ext.main.Main', {
            onInit: function () {
                // JSON 모델에 트리 데이터 설정
                var oTreeData = new JSONModel({
                    nodes: [
                        {
                            "text": "Node1",
                            "ref": "sap-icon://attachment-audio",
                            "nodes": [
                                {
                                    "text": "Node1-1",
                                    "ref": "sap-icon://attachment-e-pub",
                                    "nodes": [
                                        {
                                            "text": "Node1-1-1",
                                            "ref": "sap-icon://attachment-html"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "text": "Node1-1-2",
                                            "ref": "sap-icon://attachment-photo",
                                            "nodes": [
                                                {
                                                    "text": "Node1-1-2-1",
                                                    "ref": "sap-icon://attachment-text-file",
                                                    "nodes": [
                                                        {
                                                            "text": "Node1-1-2-1-1",
                                                            "ref": "sap-icon://attachment-video"
                                                        },
                                                        {
                                                            "text": "Node1-1-2-1-2",
                                                            "ref": "sap-icon://attachment-zip-file"
                                                        },
                                                        {
                                                            "text": "Node1-1-2-1-3",
                                                            "ref": "sap-icon://course-program"
                                                        }]}]}]},
                                {
                                    "text": "Node1-2",
                                    "ref": "sap-icon://create"
                                }]},
                        {
                            "text": "Node2",
                            "ref": "sap-icon://customer-financial-fact-sheet"
                        }]});

                // 모델을 현재 View에 설정하여 바인딩할 수 있게 함
                this.getView().setModel(oTreeData, "tree");
           },
            onTreeItemPress: function (oEvent) {
                var oSplitApp = this.byId("SplitAppDemo");
                var sItemText = oEvent.getSource().getTitle();
                console.log("aaaaaaaaaaaaa");
                // project2 화면으로 전환
                if (sItemText === "Node1" || sItemText === "Node2") {
                    console.log("bbbbbbbbbb");
                    // project2 뷰가 로드된 적이 없을 경우에만 로드
                    if (!this._project2View) {
                        console.log("ccccccccccccc");
                        XMLView.create({
                            viewName: "project2.ext.main.Main"
                        }).then(function(oView) {
                            console.log("ddddddddddddd");
                            this._project2View = oView;
                            oSplitApp.addDetailPage(oView);
                            oSplitApp.toDetail(oView);
                        }.bind(this));
                    } else {
                        oSplitApp.toDetail(this._project2View);
                    }}}});});

3. manifest.json

{
"_version": "1.59.0",
"sap.app": {
"id": "project1",
"type": "application",
"i18n": "i18n/i18n.properties",
"applicationVersion": {
"version": "0.0.1"
},
"title": "{{appTitle}}",
"description": "{{appDescription}}",
"resources": "resources.json",
"sourceTemplate": {
"id": "@sap/generator-fiori:fpm",
"version": "1.13.0",
"toolsId": "458009ce-b1aa-445c-a874-3b09dfbfd21d"
},
"dataSources": {
"mainService": {
"uri": "/odata/v4/code/",
"type": "OData",
"settings": {
"annotations": [],
"odataVersion": "4.0"
}}}},
"sap.ui": {
"technology": "UI5",
"icons": {
"icon": "",
"favIcon": "",
"phone": "",
"phone@2": "",
"tablet": "",
"tablet@2": ""
},
"deviceTypes": {
"desktop": true,
"tablet": true,
"phone": true
}},
"sap.ui5": {
"flexEnabled": true,
"dependencies": {
"minUI5Version": "1.130.0",
"libs": {
"sap.m": {},
"sap.ui.core": {},
"sap.ushell": {},
"sap.fe.templates": {}
}},
"contentDensities": {
"compact": true,
"cozy": true
},
"models": {
"i18n": {
"type": "sap.ui.model.resource.ResourceModel",
"settings": {
"bundleName": "project1.i18n.i18n"
}},
"": {
"dataSource": "mainService",
"preload": true,
"settings": {
"synchronizationMode": "None",
"operationMode": "Server",
"autoExpandSelect": true,
"earlyRequests": true
}},
"@i18n": {
"type": "sap.ui.model.resource.ResourceModel",
"uri": "i18n/i18n.properties"
}},
"resources": {
"css": []
},
"routing": {
"config": {
"routerClass": "sap.m.routing.Router",
"viewType": "XML",
"viewPath": "project1.ext.main", 
"controlAggregation": "pages",
"async": true
},
"routes": [
{
"name": "MasterCodesMain",
"pattern": ":?query:",
"target": "MasterCodesMain"
},
{
"name": "project2Route",
"pattern": "project2",
"target": "project2View"
}
],
"targets": {
"MasterCodesMain": {
"type": "Component",
"id": "MasterCodesMain",
"name": "sap.fe.core.fpm",
"options": {
"settings": {
"viewName": "project1.ext.main.Main",
"contextPath": "/MasterCodes"
}
}
},
"project2View": {
"viewName": "Main",
"viewPath": "project2.ext.main",
"viewType": "XML",
"controlAggregation": "detailPages",
"controlId": "SplitAppDemo"
}}}}}

 

 

<Project2>
1. Main.view.xml

<mvc:View
xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"
xmlns="sap.m"
xmlns:macros="sap.fe.macros"
xmlns:html="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml"
controllerName="project2.ext.main.Main">
<Page id="Main" title="{i18n>MainTitle}">
<content>
<Text text="123456789" id="Text1"/>
</content>
</Page>
</mvc:View>

 2. manifest.json

{
"_version": "1.59.0",
"sap.app": {
"id": "project2",
"type": "application",
"i18n": "i18n/i18n.properties",
"applicationVersion": {
"version": "0.0.1"
},
"title": "{{appTitle}}",
"description": "{{appDescription}}",
"resources": "resources.json",
"sourceTemplate": {
"id": "@sap/generator-fiori:fpm",
"version": "1.13.0",
"toolsId": "dc1af02f-f6ab-4b49-878f-663afba60b68"
},
"dataSources": {
"mainService": {
"uri": "/odata/v4/code/",
"type": "OData",
"settings": {
"annotations": [],
"odataVersion": "4.0"
}}}},
"sap.ui": {
"technology": "UI5",
"icons": {
"icon": "",
"favIcon": "",
"phone": "",
"phone@2": "",
"tablet": "",
"tablet@2": ""
},
"deviceTypes": {
"desktop": true,
"tablet": true,
"phone": true
}
},
"sap.ui5": {
"flexEnabled": true,
"dependencies": {
"minUI5Version": "1.130.0",
"libs": {
"sap.m": {},
"sap.ui.core": {},
"sap.ushell": {},
"sap.fe.templates": {}
}
},
"contentDensities": {
"compact": true,
"cozy": true
},
"models": {
"i18n": {
"type": "sap.ui.model.resource.ResourceModel",
"settings": {
"bundleName": "project2.i18n.i18n"
}
},
"": {
"dataSource": "mainService",
"preload": true,
"settings": {
"synchronizationMode": "None",
"operationMode": "Server",
"autoExpandSelect": true,
"earlyRequests": true
}
},
"@i18n": {
"type": "sap.ui.model.resource.ResourceModel",
"uri": "i18n/i18n.properties"
}
},
"resources": {
"css": []
},
"routing": {
"config": {
"routerClass": "sap.m.routing.Router",
"viewType": "XML",
"viewPath": "project2.ext.main.Main", 
"controlId": "app", 
"controlAggregation": "pages",
"async": true
},
"routes": [
{
"name": "project2Main",
"pattern": "",
"target": "project2View"
} ],
"targets": {
"project2View": {
"viewName": "Main",
"viewType": "XML",
"viewPath": "project2.ext.main.Main",
"controlAggregation": "pages"
}}}}}

entry.title: What function does the administrator perform in the 'Mass decline/complete fors' menu?
entry.content:
Hello,

I wonder the 'Mass decline/complete forms' function for 360 review.

I decline the 360 review document in 'Inbox' from the 'Mass decline/complete fors' menu, and there was no difference.

@MASS decline/complete forms

entry.title: Re: Error: adding element with duplicate id 'listrepnorthwind::sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectP
entry.content:
Hi @junwu i am developing list report page, service as a northwind v2 service and through guided development in VS Code, here is the code

<Annotations Target="NorthwindModel.Product">
<Annotation Term="UI.DataPoint" Qualifier="progressvieQ">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Path="UnitsInStock" Property="Value"/>
<PropertyValue Int="100" Property="TargetValue"/>
<PropertyValue EnumMember="UI.VisualizationType/Progress" Property="Visualization"/>
</Record>
</Annotation>
</Annotations>

 

<Annotations Target="NorthwindModel.Product">
<Annotation Term="UI.LineItem">
<Collection>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="ProductID"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>productid}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="ProductName"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>productname}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="UnitPrice"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>unitprise}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/Medium"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="UnitsInStock"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>unitinstock}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/Medium"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="UnitsOnOrder"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>unitsonorder}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/Low"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="SupplierID"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>supplierid}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="CategoryID"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>categoryid}"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataFieldForAnnotation">
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="UnitPrice Chart"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="@UI.Chart#columnchart"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataFieldForAnnotation">
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>progressive}"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="@UI.DataPoint#progressiveQ"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataFieldForAnnotation">
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Progressvice"/>
<PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="@UI.DataPoint#progressiveQ"/>
<Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High"/>
</Record>
</Collection>
</Annotation>
</Annotations>

entry.title: Report shipping error
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

When i am trying to generate MSDS reports in CG54, i am getting the error as below attached image.

please help me with a solution

entry.title: btp - Error in xml not appearing
entry.content:
The file structure is as shown in the picture.

 

My screen now looks like this.

Currently, if I click the menu in project1, the xml screen of project2 does not appear and there is no response.
I hope that when I click the menu in project1, the xml of project2 will be displayed.
I don't know if it went wrong in the manifest or somewhere else,
Please look at my xml, controller, and manifest below and let me know if there are any mistakes.

I attached the files as txt files. Please refer to this.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Restful Application Programming Model (RAP), ABAP RAP File Upload Large Objects (LOB)
entry.content:
Dear Abhishek,

Thanks for sharing,

Is this possible to select multiple files to upload at once? If so, how can I achieve this? Thanks

entry.title: SKF linked with LIS
entry.content:
I was trying to transfer the activity quantities booked in process order to the SKF created by establishing the link. in S4 hana system i need the process and explanation .

kindly please share me the details and theory about the SKF link to LIS. 

Thanx & Regards ,

Chendurapu Reddy.

entry.title: Re: Where-used list for manage global hierarchies
entry.content: Question forwarded to the expert. Hope it can be answered soon.

entry.title: Re: Single Delivery from Multiple Sales Order
entry.content: thnks, its fine solution working properly

entry.title: SAP Security Patch Day – November 2024
entry.content:
Introduction

November 2024 brings critical updates for SAP systems worldwide with the release of new security patches addressing various vulnerabilities. This report provides a comprehensive analysis of the latest SAP security notes, their potential impact, and recommendations for maintaining a robust security posture.

Overview of November 2024 SAP Security Patches

This month, SAP has released a total of 10 security notes, including updates to existing ones. Notably, there are two high-priority patches that demand immediate attention from SAP administrators and security professionals.

Patch Breakdown:

  • High Priority: 2 patches
  • Medium Priority: 6 patches
  • Low Priority: 2 patches

Detailed Analysis of Key Security Notes

High Priority Patches

Note 3520281 – [CVE-2024-47590] Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability in SAP Web Dispatcher

Severity: High
CVSS Score: 8.8
Affected Component: SAP Web Dispatcher

Description:

A critical Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability exists in SAP Web Dispatcher. An unauthenticated attacker can exploit this vulnerability to inject malicious scripts into the web interface, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data theft, or manipulation. Immediate patching is essential to protect the integrity and confidentiality of your SAP systems.

Note 3483344 – [CVE-2024-39592] Missing Authorization Check in SAP PDCE

Severity: High
CVSS Score: 7.7
Affected Component: SAP PDCE (Personnel Development and Capability Evaluation)

Description:

A missing authorization check in SAP PDCE could allow an authenticated attacker with low privileges to access sensitive data or perform unauthorized operations. Organizations utilizing SAP PDCE should apply this patch promptly to prevent potential data breaches and maintain compliance with security policies.

Medium Priority Patches

Note 3335394 – [CVE-2024-42372] Missing Authorization Check in SAP NetWeaver AS Java (System Landscape Directory)

Severity: Medium
CVSS Score: 6.5
Affected Component: SAP NetWeaver AS Java (System Landscape Directory)

Description:

This vulnerability involves missing authorization checks that could allow an unauthenticated attacker to access sensitive functions within the System Landscape Directory. Applying this patch is crucial to close the security gap and protect your system's integrity.

Note 3509619 – [CVE-2024-47595] Local Privilege Escalation in SAP Host Agent

Severity: Medium
CVSS Score: 6.3
Affected Component: SAP Host Agent

Description:

A local privilege escalation vulnerability exists in SAP Host Agent. An attacker with local access and limited privileges could exploit this vulnerability to gain elevated privileges on the system. Timely application of this patch will prevent unauthorized privilege escalation and potential system compromise.

Note 3393899 – [CVE-2024-47592] Information Disclosure Vulnerability in SAP NetWeaver AS Java (Logon Application)

Severity: Medium
CVSS Score: 5.3
Affected Component: SAP NetWeaver AS Java (Logon Application)

Description:

This vulnerability could allow an attacker to access sensitive information without proper authorization by exploiting the logon application. Patching this vulnerability will help prevent unauthorized data access and potential information leaks.

Note 3504390 – [CVE-2024-47586] NULL Pointer Dereference Vulnerability in SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP and ABAP Platform

Severity: Medium
CVSS Score: 5.3
Affected Component: SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP and ABAP Platform

Description:

A NULL pointer dereference vulnerability could lead to a denial-of-service condition, causing the system to crash or become unresponsive. Applying this patch is important to ensure system stability and availability.

Note 3522953 – [CVE-2024-47588] Information Disclosure Vulnerability in SAP NetWeaver Java (Software Update Manager)

Severity: Medium
CVSS Score: 4.7
Affected Component: SAP NetWeaver Java (Software Update Manager)

Description:

This vulnerability may expose sensitive information during the software update process. Implementing the provided patch will safeguard against unauthorized data disclosure and enhance the security of your update procedures.

Note 3508947 – [CVE-2024-47593] Information Disclosure Vulnerability in SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP and ABAP Platform

Severity: Medium
CVSS Score: 4.3
Affected Component: SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP and ABAP Platform

Description:

An information disclosure vulnerability that could allow unauthorized access to sensitive data within the system. Patching this vulnerability is recommended to maintain data confidentiality and prevent potential exploitation.

Low Priority Patches

Note 3498470 – [CVE-2024-47587] Missing Authorization Check in SAP Cash Management (Cash Operations)

Severity: Low
CVSS Score: 3.5
Affected Component: SAP Cash Management (Cash Operations)

Description:

A missing authorization check could potentially allow unauthorized users to access specific functionalities within Cash Operations. Applying this patch will enhance security controls and prevent unauthorized transactions or data access.

Note 3392049 – [CVE-2024-33000] Missing Authorization Check in SAP Bank Account Management

Severity: Low
CVSS Score: 3.5
Affected Component: SAP Bank Account Management

Description:

This vulnerability may allow unauthorized users to access sensitive bank account information due to missing authorization checks. It is advisable to apply the patch to prevent unauthorized access and ensure compliance with financial data protection regulations.

The Importance of Timely Patch Management

The November 2024 SAP Security Patch Day highlights the ongoing need for proactive security measures within SAP environments. Unpatched vulnerabilities are a primary attack vector for cybercriminals, making prompt and effective patch management essential for minimizing security risks.

Complete List of November 2024 SAP Security Notes

Note# Title Priority CVSS Score

3520281[CVE-2024-47590] Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability in SAP Web DispatcherHigh8.8
3483344[CVE-2024-39592] Missing Authorization Check in SAP PDCEHigh7.7
3335394[CVE-2024-42372] Missing Authorization Check in SAP NetWeaver AS Java (System Landscape Directory)Medium6.5
3509619[CVE-2024-47595] Local Privilege Escalation in SAP Host AgentMedium6.3
3393899[CVE-2024-47592] Information Disclosure Vulnerability in SAP NetWeaver AS Java (Logon Application)Medium5.3
3504390[CVE-2024-47586] NULL Pointer Dereference Vulnerability in SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP and ABAP PlatformMedium5.3
3522953[CVE-2024-47588] Information Disclosure Vulnerability in SAP NetWeaver Java (Software Update Manager)Medium4.7
3508947[CVE-2024-47593] Information Disclosure Vulnerability in SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP and ABAP PlatformMedium4.3
3498470[CVE-2024-47587] Missing Authorization Check in SAP Cash Management (Cash Operations)Low3.5
3392049[CVE-2024-33000] Missing Authorization Check in SAP Bank Account ManagementLow3.5

This list provides a clear overview of all security notes released in the November 2024 SAP Security Patch Day. It is crucial to review each note and assess its relevance to your SAP environment.

Conclusion

The November 2024 SAP Security Patch Day underscores the critical importance of maintaining vigilant security practices within SAP landscapes. By staying informed about these vulnerabilities and promptly applying the necessary patches, organizations can significantly reduce their risk exposure and maintain robust system security.

entry.title: Re: Issue with Partner Function Configuration in Action D...
entry.content: Hi Jisna, I think that's standard behavior for ChaRM transaction. If you need to send email to multiple business partners for one partner function, customization may be needed here. Thus, SAP consulting team may be a proper choice for you. Thanks, Shawn

entry.title: Re: Steps for Sending Attachment through Service Layer API
entry.content:
Hi @SachinBG ,

First create the sales document.

Now upload the attachments in Attachment2.

Upon successful upload, you will receive the Absolute Entry.

Update the sales document with the Absolute Entry.

The sales document is updated in SAP B1 with attachments.

 

This is I have done through Postman, you can do with your program also.

Thanks.

Manish

entry.title: Re: Where-used list for manage global hierarchies
entry.content:
Hi,

You can use review booklet apps to display, analyze and validate data. 

Please checked following Help Portal Documentation about  review booklets,

Review Booklets | SAP Help Portal

Hope it helps.

Kind Regards,

Lucy

Many Thanks 

Akshay Bhandari

entry.title: Ai Assisted Skill Match
entry.content:
Hello,

So in the recent 2H2024 release, there is a skill compatibility match in the new applicant workbench. SAP mentioned that the skills will be classified as primary skills, secondary skills, other applicant skills but when I tested, I was able to see only the exact matched and unmatched skills.

How exactly does this works and is there any specific settings that need to enables in order to see the classification of skills? How does this feature helps recruiters in screening?

Thanks, and Regards

Avinesh Sundar

entry.title: where is The CK53N error log
entry.content:
Dear Consultant:

   I want to make a report show The CK53N error log,

please help me find to CK53N error log put place?

thanks...

entry.title: Re: Query execution time taking too long in OIBT Table
entry.content:
Hi @rmpal ,

Could you check your available memory when running this query?

At one of our clients, we found that the issue was caused by the SAP HANA Engine License Peak Memory reaching its limit. After increasing the memory to 128GB, the OIBT view ran without any issues.

Since the OIBT view can be slow, I usually prefer using the OITL, ITL1, and OBTN tables.

Depending on the requirements, I join these with transaction tables like OINV, OIGN, OPCH, etc.

What specifically are you planning to use the OIBT view for?

Thanks.

Manish

entry.title: Re: Handling Group Goals in Latest Goal Management
entry.content:
Good day @Srivatsa87 

I am struggling with the same issue, how were you able to get past the "You can’t import group goals using Import Performance Goals in the latest Goal Management." error?

Greetings
Barend

entry.title: How can we use cloud identity service or custom Idp on local SAP btp?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I have created a full stack CAP application with node.js with having XSUAA authentication.
Also have use Cloud identity service by which multiple user can login with their credential and use my app.
I have deployed my app and its working fine.
Any user on visiting the url it ask for idp login.

it we select custom then it redirect to custom idp login page.

SO i want to do same thing on the local sap btp at development level.
For that if i run the project locally with the command:
cds watch --profile hybrid and 
cds bind --exec -- npm start --prefix app/router (it is required because i declare auth type xsuaa )

It directly login with my default identity provider and

i want that it will ask to login with custom idp login on local sap btp at the development phase.

Thank you..

entry.title: Re: MD04 showing duplicate both poitem and order ack AB
entry.content:
Hi,

This is because you insert an illegal AB data, you should refresh it after insert.

you can try manually insert an AB, system will auto calculate the reduce qty, then it will be fine in MD04.

entry.title: Re: How can I auto close the MM & FI Period in SAP Hana 1...
entry.content:
Hello @0018280030 

MM period can be closed with the MMPV transaction. It can be scheduled as a monthly background job to close periods automatically. 

If you need to still to post to a closed (previous) period, you can enable that with MMRV. However that can be user dependent, i.e. a period is either closed or not, posting to the previous period is either allowed or not. That can't be limited based on user ids.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

If you have resolved the issue let me know.

entry.title: Re: Issue with MD04 - empty MRP element type Column
entry.content:
Hello Mani,  While i looking at given screenshot I understand that, POitem (PO item) related MRP element is missing and it may be due to schedule line item table data inconsistency. If this is case you can please this note 2044484 - Troubleshoot to EKET, EKES, EKBE table inconsistencies - SAP ERP & SAP S/4 HANA to fix the issue in table.

Also you can check if there any discrepancy in MRP element list in OMD5.

Regards

Prasath

entry.title: How to use and deploy Cloud foundry task on SAP BTP?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

This is my second post about cloud foundry task.
First post link: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/how-to-create-custom-cloud-foundry-tasks-in-sap-btp/qaq-p/13933513 
This post is extension of previous.

Cloud foundry Tasks : 
A task is an app or script, the code of which is included as part of a deployed app, but runs independently in its own container.

I have created a custom js file in which have business logic to implement some operation.
In mta file i do some change by following these articles:
https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/deploying-content-with-cf-task-execution
https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/mta-deployment-descriptor-examples

Under tasks>myBackgroundTask.js have some business logic.

After doing these changes i have deployed the app.

task-auto-mta1 is one my created CF tasks but it get error after the start.

Anyone please guide me to do further.

Thank you.

entry.title: Is there a way to delete session cookies after user logs out from Fiori launchpad?
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a requirement to delete session cookies after user logs out of Fiori launchpad. I found blogs for deleting session cookies from portal on logout but nothing specific for Fiori launchpad.

entry.title: How to create a live connection between SAP Analytics Cloud and AWS Redshift
entry.content:
If you’re looking to set up an Acquired Data connection between SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) and AWS Redshift, you can create an SQL connection directly from SAC using SAP Cloud Connector and SAP Cloud Agent. Check out my previous blog post for a step-by-step guide: How to create an imported connection between SAP Analytics Cloud and AWS Redshift

But if you need a Live Data connection, you will need a third-party software, or set up the SAP Data Provisioning Agent (DP Agent) and create this Live Data connection through an SAP HANA Cloud database instance on the SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP). In this blog post, I’ll walk you through this process.

With this approach, we are adding an intermediate layer (SAP HANA Cloud) that not only enables the Live Data connection between SAC and Redshift, with an amazing performance and at an acceptable cost, but also brings additional benefits to SAC that are not possible with other approaches, including:

  • Integrate multiple sources: integrate data in SAC not only from Redshift, but also from other source systems: on-premise, cloud, SAP, non-SAP, via Virtual access or Replication.
  • User Authorizations: implement user authorizations in SAC using SAP HANA’s authorization features, such as user groups, roles, and privileges (both static and dynamic).
  • Connection Security: implement secure connections using multiple protocols (SAML, JWT, OpenID), data anonymization, encryption, access controls, certifications, and other built-in security features.
  • Data Modeling: build data models in SAP HANA, enabling SAC functionalities like parameters, hierarchies, data blending, support for diverse data types, and more, that are not possible with other approaches.

 

Steps to follow

First, we will need to install and set up DP Agent on a dedicated server. After that, we will connect HANA Cloud to Redshift. Then, we will connect the Plain Schema with the HDI Container in HANA Cloud. Finally, we will create a Live Data connection from SAC to HANA Cloud.

 

Integration architecture

 

Step 1 - Connect Redshift with HANA Cloud

1.1 - DP Agent - Installation and configuration

  • Download the DP Agent – follow this link.
  • Install the DP Agent on Windows – follow this link.
  • Configure the DP Agent – follow this link.

1.2 - HANA DBX – Connect to AWS Redshift

  • Create a remote source using HANA Database Explorer – follow this link.

 

Step 2 - Connect Plain Schema with HDI Container in HANA Cloud

2.1 - HANA DBX – Create the schema and virtual objects

  • Create the schema where the virtual objects will be created, create the virtual objects in that schema, create the Application user, create the Access role for that schema, and assign the role to the Application user. This tutorial by Thomas Jung is outstanding.

2.2 - BTP Cockpit – Activate and configure BAS

  • Configure the BAS entitlement, subscribe to BAS, and grant user permissions – follow this link.

2.3 - BAS – Create a Dev Space and a HANA database project

  • Configure BAS following this tutorial by Thomas Jung.

2.4 - BTP Cockpit – Create a User-Provided HDI instance

  • You can create it from BAS, by adding a Database connection. The hdbgrants file is automatically created – follow steps 1 and 2 of this tutorial.

2.5 - BAS - Connect HDI container with schema

  • Create hdbsynonyms file and create the synonyms to connect the HDI container with the schema–  follow steps 3 and 4 of this tutorial.

2.6 - BAS – Create a calculation view

  • Create a calculation view, and add the tables to the nodes using the previous synonyms – Follow this tutorial.

 

Step 3 - Connect HANA Cloud with SAC

3.1 - SAC – Create a live connection to HANA Cloud

  • Create a live data connection to SAP HANA Cloud using an "SAP HANA Cloud" connection. For single sign-on (SSO), you will need to enable a custom SAML identity provider - follow this link.

3.2 - SAC – Create a model

  • Create a model using the live data connection – follow this link.

3.3 - SAC - Create a story / insight

  • Create a new story (optimized) using the model – follow this link.
  • You can also create an insight following this link.

 

Now you are ready to create stories in SAC using a live data connection from Redshift!

If you run into any issues along the way, feel free to leave a comment—I’d be happy to assist.



Kind regards,

Carlos Pinto

Saclab Consulting

entry.title: Re: Source list: valid date
entry.content:
Hello @tomas_martinez18 , You can please go head and adding new contract in existing source, this will give insights or tracking about procurement strategy followed in past.

While adding contract, please make sure validity date maintained correctly.

Regards

Prasath

entry.title: 8D Reporting and Print Form in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud: Availability, Integration, and Licensing
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Our team is looking into quality management features in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, particularly around 8D reporting. We have a few specific questions and would appreciate any guidance:

  1. Availability: Is there a standard 8D reporting tool and print form natively available within SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, or would custom development or third-party integration be necessary for this functionality?

  2. Integration with SAP BTP: If native 8D reporting is not available, is it feasible to integrate an 8D report and print form using SAP BTP? We’d appreciate recommendations on the most effective way to leverage SAP BTP for this enhancement in quality management.

  3. Licensing Considerations: Would utilizing SAP BTP for enabling or extending 8D reporting and print form capabilities involve additional licensing costs? Insights into the licensing model for such integrations would be extremely helpful.

Thank you for any insights and experiences shared!

entry.title: MCQ Cnnfirmation
entry.content:
I am currently undergoing training in the course "Getting Started with SAP HCM and HCM Payroll." After completing the quiz for Chapter 3, I found that my answer was marked incorrect. I selected **Option B**, Where Mcqs Was:

 
Q2.What is meant by the integration of Personnel Administration and Organizational Management?
A: The cost center relationship is inherited from Organizational Management if Controlling is integrated
B: Every detail of the organizational structure can be used as default values in Personnel Administration
 
I later asked this question to three different AI tools (ChatGPT, Gemini, and Poe), and they all provided the same answer, confirming that Option B was correct. Please Guide me in this Error.

entry.title: Re: Import Sales Orders (Part 9): Creation with Reference
entry.content: Hi @priya_sshekhar, in the Cloud version, the function has been released. But not avaible in OP, you can raise requirement for OP version.

entry.title: BR0100E Internal error for 'backup_status: at location BrDbfBackCheck-3
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts;

In my SAP ERP system running on Oracle DB, lately I am noticing my backup is failing with the following errors:

BR0100E Internal error for 'backup_status: /oracle/SID/sapdata2/sr3_127/sr3.data127' at location BrDbfBackCheck-3
BR0340I Switching to the next online redolog filefor database instance SID ...
BR0321I Switch to the next online redolog file for database instance SID successful
BR0202I Saving space_log
BR0301E SQL error -1142 at location BrTspBackAlter-3, SQL statement:
'/* BRBACKUP */ ALTER TABLESPACE "PSAPSR3" END BACKUP'
ORA-01142: cannot end online backup - none of thefiles are in backup
BR0318E 'Alter tablespace PSAPSR3 end backup' failed
BR0054I BRBACKUP terminated with errors

 

I tried to re-run it, but the same errors keep coming, I am monitoring the logs via DB13.

 

Your feedback will be appreciated.

 

Best regards

Amal Aloun

entry.title: Re: SmartFilterBar does not work after navigation
entry.content:
for me working

onInit: function () {
            const oODataModel = this.getOwnerComponent().getModel();
            this.getView().setModel(oODataModel);
            this.getOwnerComponent().getRouter().getRoute("Page11").attachPatternMatched(this.onRoutePatternMatched, this);
           
        },
        onRoutePatternMatched: function () {
            const smartFilterBar = this.getView().byId("id11SmartFilterBar");
            if (smartFilterBar) {
                if (!smartFilterBar.isInitialised()) {
                    smartFilterBar.attachInitialise(function () {
                        smartFilterBar.search();
                    });
                } else {
                    smartFilterBar.search();
                }
            }
           
        }

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Hi @tarzibou ,

Thanks for getting in touch. I'm always interested in such projects. However, I don't quite understand: You have a SUSE distro inside a Docker container sitting on a Debian distro inside a VM Workstation - is that right? What is the advantage of that setup? It sounds relatively slow.

What am I missing?
Thanks and best wishes,

Julie.

entry.title: Re: Service Contract Cancell Reason
entry.content:
Hello,

Yes, you can add more reasons for canceling a Service Contract Item in SAP S/4HANA Cloud by customizing the Cancellation Reason field. This customization is performed through the "Manage Your Solution" application, where you can adapt the standard list to include additional reasons specific to your business needs.

To add new cancellation reasons:
1. Navigate to the "Manage Your Solution" app.
2. Go to Settings for Rejection Reasons.

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

I have imported the walkthrough of ui5 sdk in web ide by mistake. Earlier version of walkthrough was in web ide, it was now migrated to BAS. So, it has .yaml, npm too. npm has been installed but by mistake I imported the code in web ide. I need to rectify, I am doing the code in VS Studio.

Kaushik

SAP UI5/Fiori

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration requirement
entry.content:
Hello @ramu_g4 ,

Yes, the Kafka adapter can work with a CPI instance hosted in the public cloud, but the kafka broker must be accessible form internet. This is generally preferred way, so many at times they would not agree for this approach. The other way around would be to use a VPN. We will have to leverage a cloud connector which can connect with CPI and kafka broker within same VPN.

entry.title: Re: How to extend 500 GL codes to 4 new company codes
entry.content: You could do this with FS15 only

entry.title: Re: Sales Order Creation - BAdi for S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: Is there any new finding? I'm also looking for BADI, which can be triggered after sales document(order, delivery, billing, purchasing...) saving to DB.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to consider the stock from two storage...
entry.content:
Hello @RaghavanKathamuthu 

MRP areas by definition are planned separately. Therefore you can not have them separated from sales orders point of view and combined from production order perspective.

What you can do however is implement Stock Determination in production orders and customize the strategy so production storage location is picked first and if stock is not available there, then sales storage location is picked next.

Stock determination is customized in Materials Management -> Inventory Management and Physical Inventory -> Stock Determination -> ...

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: How to Pass Dynamic Selection Field in SAP ABAP Submi...
entry.content: Check online documenttion for WITH FREE SELECTIONS texpr  which contains a sample code to build the texpr structure.

entry.title: Re: Do service orders take into account common distributi...
entry.content:
Hello,

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud, for service orders dealing with non-stock materials that are externally sourced, the system relies on the material master data being properly configured and extended to the relevant organizational levels. This typically includes sales organization, distribution channel, and plant.

When you encounter an issue with the material not being extended to the specified distribution channel, it could potentially point towards a misconfiguration in the material master or the organizational structure settings. Common distribution channels are designed to streamline the master data maintenance by allowing materials to be extended to multiple distribution channels without individual extensions. However, this setup needs to be properly configured in the system to function correctly.

For the common distribution channel to work effectively with service orders in S/4HANA Cloud, you can check the following:
1. **Material Master Configuration**: The material needs to be maintained correctly in the material master, with appropriate settings to ensure it covers the common distribution channel setup.
2. **Common Distribution Channel Setup**: Under Logistics General in Customizing, you need to set up the common distribution channel and assign it to sales organizations and distribution channels as needed.


3. **Check Organizational Data in Service Order**: Ensure that the service order has the correct organizational data, including the distribution channel that aligns with where the material is extended.

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Options to restrict Proxy Rights for specific users?
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

I have a requirement to restrict proxy rights for managers in the organizations, who should only be able to assign other managers as their own proxy.

However, it does not seem possible to do this. The function "manage proxy" would allow users to not only assign a proxy for themselves, but also for other users, and could easily abuse the function by assigning themselves as the proxy of someone else.

This leaves me with only the proxy function under the settings, which is managed through the company and logo settings. I don't see a way how I could restrict this function to apply only to managers instead of the whole company.

Does anyone have some ideas how I could make the requirement work?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Catch CONVT_NO_NUMBER runtime error in OO ABAP Program
entry.content:
You can also use

TRY.
  numeric_variable = EXACT #( character_variable ).
  CATCH cx_sy_conversion_no_number.
ENDTRY.

entry.title: How to bypass the login page and directly proceed to the required page using access_token with Auth2
entry.content:
hi,
Is it possible to skip the auth login page and directly navigate to my custom login page? if yes plz tell me.

the current process is

myApp=>authO Login page=>social web site login page=> Back to my App (if successful login page)

I want to skip the auth login page.
hi, I am an SAP BTP developer and I added Xsuaa security to my application. and also use CIS identity provider.
so my question is when I share or deploy my fullstack application and end-user use that application the CIS provides its login page. I have my login page in my application too.
so how I can authorize the users who are available in my database and access that Auth2 Token so I can bypass that identity provider’s login page and authenticate users with my login page?

entry.title: Re: Process to generate Key Pair X.509 certificate from t...
entry.content:
Hi,

we got the answer as below from our local colleagues in Argentina.

Best regards,

Nils Buerckel

In Argentina, in order to generate the digital certificate for e-invoicing web service, the company needs to have for homologation (test environment) a CUIT ID with password level 3 (any AR natural person). For production environment, the legal representative of the company with an authorized CUIT number could request it. In the following page, it is explained how they should do it, it is in Spanish, as it is a government tax agency page:

https://www.afip.gob.ar/ws/documentacion/certificados.asp

the customer will be able to see how to get the certificate for homologation environment and or production environment (see attached picture).

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA OP/Private Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Kaz, 

thank you so much for your amazing and great blog for Advanced Intercompany Stock transfer process. According your blog, my testing seems to be successful, but i got a problem in the step - Post Stock transfer into Physical stock. this step is pending and no any further information. could you please give me some advice for this issue? Many thanks for your help in advanced. 

you can check the process as the below screenshot showing. 
looking forward for your feedback.

entry.title: Re: To track Urgent orders in App->My Inbox
entry.content:
Hello,

To address the requirement of tracking urgent sales orders marked via a custom field (e.g., `IsSOUrgent`) in the My Inbox app without setting up a complex and maintenance-heavy additional workflow, you can consider utilizing the Situation Handling framework available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud. This framework allows you to automate the monitoring and notification process for specific business situations as defined by your business needs.

Here's how you can leverage Situation Handling to manage urgent sales orders:

1. **Define a Situation Type for Urgent Sales Orders**:
- You would create a situation type specifically for sales orders where the `IsSOUrgent` field is marked. This situation type can be configured to automatically trigger notifications or actions when an urgent sales order is detected.

2. **Automatic Notification**:
- Once the situation type is activated, responsible users can get automatically notified when a sales order is marked as urgent. This ensures prompt attention without manual intervention to check the status regularly.

3. **Actionable Insights**:
- In the My Inbox app, users can receive direct links to the urgent sales orders, allowing them to take appropriate actions swiftly. Additionally, this can be configured to provide options like accelerating the approval process or prioritizing these orders in logistics.

4. **Manage and Adapt Situation Types**:
- You can manage the conditions, recipients, and actions of the situation type according to changing business requirements through the Manage Situation Types app.

This approach not only reduces the manual effort involved in tracking such sales orders but also enhances the responsiveness and adaptability of your operations to critical business requirements. It avoids the complexities of modifying the existing workflow for sales orders, making the system easier to maintain and manage.

For detailed instructions on setting up Situation Handling for sales orders and using the Manage Situation Types app, you can refer to the following links:
- [Manage Situation Types](https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/60748ea9f37d4692912578b698aaefee.html)
- [Situation Handling](https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/516c8ecb7462453ca430a42481cc33ec.html)

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Re: How does IAS System handle the Multiple Employment is...
entry.content:
Yes, 

in this case example saif has two employments, and currently he has the username of 1100111 only, ut the values that the IAS caputring is of its previous employment "saif@example.com ".

So the record is synced but with the old username, or the data from SF is not updating in the IAS.

What should the steps be to remove this problem of multiple employment in IAS?

entry.title: Re: BADI/EXIT: Only after Sales Order details been saved in the database
entry.content: Is there any BADI can do same things ? I'm looking for a BADI which can be triggered after sales document(order, delivery, billing, purchasing...) saving to DB.

entry.title: Re: Sap Webi calculate the first and last assessments in...
entry.content:
Hi Raz11,
since this is less of a technical problem and more of a coding problem let me give you my idea how your goal can be achieved:
First you need to have a way of getting the first and last entry for the current day. In order to get such a list you basically need to split the entire list per patient and order that list by the timestamp ascending which yields a sublist including all measurements for that patient. Next find the first and the last entry. Repeat this step for all patients.
Depending on what technology you are using (all done in OpenSQL or loading the entire medical database into one itab via OpenSQL and extracting the data for each patient into another itab via OpenSQL/ABAP your exact way of doing may differ.

One solution (may not be the most efficient one) is to do a SELECT on the medical database to get all data, a SELECT DISTINCT on the same but just for the patient Ids. Then loop over patient IDs and for each patient IDmake query against the medical itab where you fetch all the data associated with that patient and store them in a third iTab let's call it lt_patient_data. Get the length of that itab via data(lv_tab_size) lines( lt_patient_data). Finally you can access this table via index. Index [1] for the first element, Index [lv_tab_size] for the last entry (ABAP starts at 1 with indexing).

This code snippet should show my idea

 

 

" Get all data
select * from t005 into table (lt_t005).
  
" Get the primary key (PK)
select distinct land1 from t005 into table (lt_laender).
  
" Loop over all the PK values
loop at lt_laender into data(ls_land).
  
  " Query against the main db with the PK
  select * from _t005 as t where land1 = _land-land1 into table (lt_t005_02).
    
  " Get the table size
  data(lv_tab_size) = lines( lt_t005_02 ).
    
  " Retrieve the firs and the last row
  data(ls_first_row) = lt_t005_02[ 1 ].
  data(ls_last_row) = lt_t005_02[ lv_tab_size ].
  
  " Work with the data
  ls_first_row...
  
ENDLOOP.

Edit: For the second question you have to be more specific what your goal is. Meaning what exactly you want to calculate. If you just want one of the like 3 values per patient per day then either first/last entry with indexing OR with a different subselect.

If your goal is to do the calculation of the say first entry for all patients with one SQL statement you should aim to first extract the first measurement per patient from the table and store those data in a second table and then iterate over that secondary table and do the calcs

entry.title: Re: Setup of the SAP Signavio Process Insights connection and content setup request in SAP Signavio
entry.content: Thanks for this amazing Blog Post @lukas_stier 🕺

entry.title: Re: Changing field value for "Assigned To" in Work Order...
entry.content:
Hello @roshan89 ,

i took a short look into the Metadata for the WorkOrderOperationCreateUpdate.page (in SSAM 2310) - this field is not available there.

So it will not beeing added by changing in SYCLO --> you will need to develop and integrate the field in the Metadata to be able to edit it.

Regards

Björn

entry.title: Re: AFAB ERROR - Asset under AUC changed DepKey to '0000'...
entry.content: The check is done regardless, you can add account and then simulate to check it.

entry.title: Re: VAT Report Previews

entry.title: Re: How to send SuccessFactors events in real time to CPI using Intelligent Services Center
entry.content: Nice explanation

entry.title: Welcome
entry.content:
Dear course participants,

Welcome to the discussion forum for the course “Putting AI Ethics into Practice at SAP”.

I’m a SAP Learning MOOC project manager and I worked closely with the subject matter experts to create this course for you.

A special note of thanks to our experts Bettina Laugwitz, Khawla Mallat, Vikram Nagendra, Daniel Schmid, Sherene Tan, Saskia Welsch, who have worked diligently on the course content from across all our SAP locations.

SAP believes that artificial intelligence (AI) has the potential to unlock all kinds of opportunities for businesses, governments, and society. However, AI also has the potential to create economic, political, and social challenges.

In this course, you’ll learn the importance and principles of AI ethics, how SAP set up an ethics governance framework, and which rules SAP employees need to follow during the development, deployment, use, and sale of AI systems.

The learning effort to complete this course is approximately 1 hour.

Each lesson includes a video lecture, and at the end of the course, there is a quiz. 

While the course is running, we invite you to post all your content-related questions on this forum so you can discuss them with other learners and get answers directly from the content experts.

Good luck with the quiz and enjoy taking part in the forum!

Thank you for choosing SAP Learning!

Kind regards,
Britta Radicke-Schlinsog

(SAP Learning team)

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Extensions of the Planning Area Defined by the Table Context QRC2 2024
entry.content:
Hi @derekl_johnson, 

Thanks for recognizing this issue. I've noticed that cell input readiness formatting and the table feature "Reason for unplannable data" simply do not work any longer when specifically dynamic extension of planning area is used (in addition to the already known general issues with input readiness detection with Planning Area, which behaves better when DAC enabled dimensions are added to any table axis).
Hope you can provide a timeline soon? As it is indeed not good for user experience and general adoption of planning area's feature (since 2021).

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Best Practices for Just Ask
entry.content: Country vs Region should be reviewed

entry.title: Re: HC300 deploying CVD_PD Error 170057 No visible output...

Hi @DCR 
I reached out to our experts. Please allow for a delay in our response.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Publish Data - SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content: How about not even granting read Access to those elements he is not permitted to write on. So in the Story he only writes on those which he can see.

entry.title: Re: Basic Customizing for Stock Investments
entry.content: Very informative

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to consider the stock from two storage...
entry.content:
Hello @RaghavanKathamuthu  Appreciated your time in detailing notes.

There are two components to be answered in your questions,

Make to stock (Production order related MRP area location) and Make to order (Sales order related MRP area location). If you want get Planned order against PIR or against sales order, you have choose respective planning strategy and It does mean you have use the flow as per optimized method. 

In your case PIR is created Plant level for 10 Qty and at Prd location MRP area level PIR created 101B, So that component got expanded to Prd location based MRP area (check location Maintained  at Production version and Material master).

If you want to have Planned order to be at MRP area level, you need have location mapped in Production version (PIR) and sales order(Location).

Regards

Prasath

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Transactional Data Upload
entry.content:
It may be due to the default hierarchies not including the elements you need.

Please review each dimension that contains a hierarchy.

entry.title: Taking a Shortcut - Navigate from SAP Risk and Assurance Management to your source system
entry.content:
In SAP Risk and Assurance Management, you can quickly access detailed information by navigating from issues or tasks to documents or business data in the source system.

When properly configured, you can navigate directly to documents or business data in the source system to streamline your workflow and enhance your productivity.

You can find a step-by-step procedure on how to configure the navigation targets in the Process Issues Settings app here:

 

Watch the following step-by-step procedure to see how to navigate from an issue to the business data in the source system using the Process Issues app:

 

Watch the following step-by-step procedure to see how to navigate from a task to the business data in the source system using the My Inbox app:

#Gen AI was used to help to generate this content.

Further information

You can find more information Administration Guide for SAP Risk and Assurance Management on the SAP Help Portal or in the following blog post SAP Financial Compliance / Risk and Assurance Management covers much more than Finance.

User Assistance on the SAP Help Portal

Product Page for SAP Risk and Assurance Management https://help.sap.com/ram
Configure Navigation Targets
Prerequisites: App Navigation for Issues and Tasks -> HTTP Destinations

entry.title: Re: Call API returns code 500
entry.content: Before coding in ABAP, test your request via a dedicated software like Postman. Does it work?

entry.title: 4.3 Web Intelligence Data Lineage Challenge
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm looking for an opinion here.

I have recently been exploring the usability of the new Data view functionality available in BI 4.3 Web Intelligence.

One of the use cases is to build 2 queries from the same universe and join these 2 queries with joins that aren't specified in the source universe. A neat solution to an uncommon problem, but a solution all the same.

So I build a data cube with the data from the two queries with my required joins

The two queries have common objects that are not part of the joins made above and the resulting cube renames the object from the child query with a (1). This looks untidy and when I look at resulting cube, I note that I cannot actually identify the data source within the document dictionary, so I decide to rename my objects via object properties to preserve the data lineage

I was not prepared for what happened next - the renaming of an object in Query 1 renamed the object in Query 2 as well. I have not merged dimensions in this report.

The attachment shows an example of this happening using the efashion universe

I opened a ticket with Support and have been told that this is working as expected, but I don't think this makes sense

Does anyone else have an opinion on this?

regards

James

entry.title: Re: Bar chart with distinct count, Percent of total
entry.content: Thanks for the reply, didn't try that because it seemed to complicated for this (or meybe my level...). Found a workaround, used a crosstab and added an Embedded summary that divides by 100, and used the crosstab chart

entry.title: Hi, I want to add new custom field in me47 item ?

after stock segment

Please help!

entry.title: Re: What is the difference between Write and Preprocessin...
entry.content:
Check online help

preprocessing program (BC-CCM-ADK)
Program that can be run before data archiving to prepare data for archiving and check data for archivability.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Is it truly a limitation?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I updated a public dimension with over 250,000 master data entries and a hierarchy, and it worked fine. Is the following information really accurate?

See Link: https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/boc/3354605674.html 

Kind regards,

Ismail

entry.title: Re: atc error-invalid name ENQUEUE_PROCESSED for DATA/STA...
entry.content:
As already said, the variable name doesn't fit the naming conventions defined in your company.

You forgot to say that the function module was generated by SAP (function modules starting with VIEWFRAME are generated by the Table Maintenance Generator), i.e. it was not written by you.

ATC should not run neither on SAP source code nor on source code generated by SAP. Ask your team to configure ATC to omit all these units of SAP source code.
